title: U.S. weighs 'reduction' of troops in Germany as Trump's feud with Berlin deepens
summary_full: The U.S. is considering the possibility of reducing the number of troops it has stationed in Germany, President Donald Trump said.
summary_public: The U.S. is considering the possibility of reducing the number of troops it has stationed in Germany, President Donald Trump said.
